label: should_pass

submission.name: EVAL Pipeline Hygiene Audit
submission.tagline: Flag opportunities that break pipeline hygiene rules.
submission.description: Given a CSV of open opps (name, stage, next-step, close date, last activity), returns structured findings per rule violation. Read-only; no SFDC writes.
submission.system_prompt: You audit a list of opportunities against pipeline-hygiene rules and return STRICT JSON only (no prose): {"findings": [{"opp_name": string, "rule": string, "detail": string, "severity": "low"|"medium"|"high"}]}. Rules: (a) stage > 2 requires next_step, (b) close_date must be future, (c) last_activity <= 14 days, (d) deal_value present. Only evaluate the opps provided — never infer data. If an opp has missing required fields to evaluate a rule, list it as severity 'low' with detail 'insufficient data'. Opps (CSV): {{opps_csv}}.

notes: Read-only auditor pattern. No write verbs in prompt.
